tasks.label: 🚀 Deploy Chernarus Services
tasks.detail: Deploy complete Surviving Chernarus infrastructure stack (Traefik, PostgreSQL, n8n, Pi-hole, etc.)

tasks.label: 🛑 Stop Chernarus Services
tasks.detail: Stop all Surviving Chernarus services and cleanup containers

tasks.label: 🔄 Restart Chernarus Services
tasks.detail: Restart all running Chernarus services

tasks.label: 📝 View Service Logs
tasks.detail: View real-time logs from all services

tasks.label: Check Kubernetes Cluster Status
tasks.detail: Check the status of the Kubernetes cluster

tasks.label: Deploy to Kubernetes
tasks.detail: Deploy all Kubernetes manifests

tasks.label: Lint Shell Scripts
tasks.detail: Run ShellCheck on all shell scripts

tasks.label: Format Markdown Files
tasks.detail: Format all Markdown files using Prettier

tasks.label: Backup Kubernetes Cluster
tasks.detail: Create a backup of the Kubernetes cluster

tasks.label: Clean Docker Environment
tasks.detail: Clean up Docker containers, networks, and unused images

tasks.label: Generate Documentation
tasks.detail: Generate and update project documentation

tasks.label: 🏗️ Setup Kubernetes Master (rpi)
tasks.detail: Setup Kubernetes master node on Raspberry Pi (rpi)

tasks.label: 👥 Join Kubernetes Worker (lenlab)
tasks.detail: Join lenlab as worker node to Kubernetes cluster

tasks.label: 📊 Chernarus Health Check
args: echo '🔍 Checking Chernarus Infrastructure...' && docker-compose ps && echo -e '\n📡 Network Status:' && ping -c 2 192.168.0.2 && ping -c 2 192.168.0.3 && echo -e '\n☸️ Kubernetes Status:' && kubectl get nodes -o wide 2>/dev/null || echo 'Kubernetes not available'
tasks.detail: Complete health check of Chernarus infrastructure (Docker + K8s + Network)

tasks.label: 🌐 Check Traefik Dashboard
args: echo '🚀 Opening Traefik Dashboard...' && curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/rawdata | jq '.routers | keys' || echo 'Traefik not responding on port 8080'
tasks.detail: Check Traefik reverse proxy status and routes

tasks.label: 🗄️ PostgreSQL Health Check
tasks.detail: Check PostgreSQL database health and connectivity

tasks.label: 🤖 n8n Workflow Status
args: echo '🤖 Checking n8n automation engine...' && curl -s http://localhost:5678/healthz || echo 'n8n not responding on port 5678'
tasks.detail: Check n8n automation engine status

tasks.label: 🛡️ Pi-hole DNS Status
args: echo '🛡️ Checking Pi-hole DNS...' && dig @localhost terrerov.com +short || echo 'Pi-hole DNS not responding'
tasks.detail: Check Pi-hole DNS security service

tasks.label: 📈 Monitoring Stack Status
args: echo '📈 Checking monitoring stack...' && curl -s http://localhost:9090/api/v1/targets | jq '.data.activeTargets | length' && curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/health | jq '.database' || echo 'Monitoring stack issues detected'
tasks.detail: Check Prometheus and Grafana monitoring stack

tasks.label: 💾 Full Chernarus Backup
tasks.detail: Create complete backup of Chernarus infrastructure (Docker volumes + K8s + configs)

tasks.label: 🔄 Update Chernarus Stack
args: echo '🔄 Updating Chernarus stack...' && docker-compose pull && docker-compose up -d && echo '✅ Stack updated successfully'
tasks.detail: Pull latest images and update all Chernarus services

tasks.label: 🔍 Diagnose Network Issues
args: echo '🔍 Network Diagnostics...' && echo 'rpi connectivity:' && ping -c 3 192.168.0.2 && echo 'lenlab connectivity:' && ping -c 3 192.168.0.3 && echo 'Internet connectivity:' && ping -c 3 8.8.8.8 && echo 'DNS resolution:' && nslookup terrerov.com
tasks.detail: Comprehensive network connectivity and DNS diagnostics

tasks.label: 🧹 Cleanup Old Backups
args: find ~/backups -name 'chernarus_backup_*' -mtime +30 -exec rm -f {} \; && echo 'Old backups cleaned (>30 days)'
tasks.detail: Clean up backup files older than 30 days

inputs.description: Kubernetes join token (get from: sudo kubeadm token create --print-join-command)
Kubernetes CA cert hash (from join command)
